title: TC4 wand focus upgrade effect parity batch 1
implemented: ItemWandCasting-style frugal vis modifier: focus frugal ranks subtract 0.1 per rank after cap modifier with original 0.1 floor
Dynamic original focus vis costs for fireball/firebeam/frost scatter/boulder/shock chain/earthshock/excavation silk/dowsing/equal trade silk/portable hole/primal random primal cost
Original cooldown branches for fireball, frost scatter/boulder, shock chain/earthshock and primal
Potency effects for Fireball strength, FrostShard damage/count, Shock/Chain damage and Earthshock damage
Enlarge effects for Earthshock area, Portable Hole distance, Equal Trade target plane and Excavation adjacent block attempts
Extend effect for Portable Hole duration
Treasure/Silk Touch excavation drop adapter through vanilla Forge 1.19.2 loot context rather than fake drops
adapters: Excavation treasure/silk touch uses an enchanted tool ItemStack passed to Block.dropResources because TC4 BlockUtils.harvestBlock does not exist in Forge 1.19.2
Portable Hole extra tunnel cost is measured first and charged before opening the tunnel; cast() already charges the first base cost
deferred: Architect-mode area selection GUI/preview for Warding and Equal Trade
Exact server beam geometry from the original ItemFocusShock renderer path
